creator: fabio.comolli@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #94)

OK, I don't want to pollute this bug report with our considerations about my build environment. I reinstalled the packages that I built (on my one and only FreeBSD laptop) using "@JSM's 20241227 patches rebadged as virtualbox-ose70" and I confirm that VB 7.0.24 works just fine and that my W10 VM is currently active.
